fascinatedutils.setting.hud_editor.title: HUD Editor
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.title: FascinatedUtils
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_de: Are you sure you want to delete "%s"? This cannot be undone.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_re: Choose a unique name for this profile.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_po: Give your profile a name, and optionally start from the current defaults.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_na: A profile with that name already exists.
Another profile already uses that name.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.global_hud: Applies this setting to every widget at once.
fascinatedutils.social.title: Social
fascinatedutils.social.subtitle: Friends & Requests
fascinatedutils.social.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.invalid_cha: The login challenge expired. Please try again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.invalid_min: Your Minecraft session is invalid. Rejoin the server and try again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.minecraft_r: Minecraft authentication is rate limited right now. Try again in a moment.
fascinatedutils.social.error.minecraft_v: Could not verify your Minecraft account. Please try again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.invalid_ref: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.refresh_tok: Your session was invalidated. Please log in again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.invalid_acc: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
fascinatedutils.social.error.suspended_u: This account has been suspended from social features.
fascinatedutils.social.error.self_friend: You can't add yourself as a friend.
fascinatedutils.social.error.user_not_fo: No user with that name was found.
fascinatedutils.social.error.already_fri: You're already friends with that user.
fascinatedutils.social.error.friend_requ: You already have a pending request with that user.
That friend request no longer exists.
fascinatedutils.social.error.not_friends: You're not friends with that user.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell_open_keybi: Opens or closes the HUD editor.
fascinatedutils.setting.social_keybind.d: Opens or closes the social menu.
fascinatedutils.setting.show_self_namepl: Displays your name tag above your own character.
fascinatedutils.setting.show_server_list: Adds a server list button to the pause menu.
fascinatedutils.setting.confirm_disconne: Requires a second click before disconnecting from a server.
fascinatedutils.setting.turbo_entities.d: Improves performance by skipping rendering of entities outside your view.
Improves performance by skipping rendering of particles outside your view.
fascinatedutils.module.hud_background_co: The background color of HUD panels.
The outline color of HUD panels.
fascinatedutils.module.hud_padding.descr: The spacing between a HUD panel's edge and its content.
fascinatedutils.module.text_shadow.descr: Draws a drop shadow behind HUD text.
Allows compact MiniMessage HUD panels to shrink below their default minimum width.
fascinatedutils.module.fogcustomizer.atm: Controls how thick the fog appears in the Overworld. Set to 0 to disable.
fascinatedutils.module.scoreboard.hide_s: Hides the numeric scores on the sidebar scoreboard.
fascinatedutils.module.particlefilter.to: When off, particles of this type are hidden.
fascinatedutils.module.soundfilter.toggl: When off, this sound is muted.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.sh: Shows the strength level of each effect, such as II or III.
Shows how much time remains on each effect.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.fl: How many seconds before expiry an effect starts flashing. Set to 0 to disable.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.so: Sort effects by time remaining, or alphabetically by name.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.di: Show effects in a compact single row, or an expanded two-line view.
fascinatedutils.module.titles.scale_titl: Adjusts the size of title and subtitle text.
fascinatedutils.module.movement.smooth_m: Adds smoothing to camera movement when looking around.
fascinatedutils.module.movement.enable_f: Enables a custom speed multiplier while flying.
fascinatedutils.module.movement.flight_s: How fast you fly relative to the default speed.
fascinatedutils.module.music.legacy_musi: Restricts background music to legacy-era vanilla tracks. Biome soundtracks are redirected to the game channel and newer additions are skipped.
fascinatedutils.module.music.continue_mu: Keeps the current track playing when you disconnect from a server or return to the title screen.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.zoom_key.des: The key that activates zoom while held.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.zoom_level.d: How much to zoom in by default.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.scroll_to_zo: Allows the scroll wheel to adjust the zoom level while zoomed in.
Animates the zoom transition instead of snapping instantly.
fascinatedutils.module.freelook.freelook: Hold this key to look around without turning your character.
fascinatedutils.module.tab.ping_mode.des: Controls how your latency is shown in the player list.
Colors ping values in the player list based on connection quality.
fascinatedutils.module.tab.max_player_sl: Limits how many players are shown in the player list at once.
fascinatedutils.module.tps.show_mspt.des: Shows milliseconds per tick alongside TPS.
fascinatedutils.module.tps.use_tps_color: Colors the TPS display based on server performance.
fascinatedutils.module.cps.split_mouse_b: Shows click speed for the left and right mouse buttons separately.
fascinatedutils.module.coordinates.layou: Stack coordinate axes vertically, or show them all on one row.
fascinatedutils.module.coordinates.block: How many decimal places to show for your coordinates.
fascinatedutils.module.background.descri: Draws a background panel behind HUD elements.
fascinatedutils.module.rounded_corners.d: Rounds the corners of HUD background panels.
fascinatedutils.module.rounding_radius.d: How rounded the corners of HUD panels are.
fascinatedutils.module.show_border.descr: Draws an outline around HUD panels.
How thick the outline around HUD panels appears.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_he: Displays your helmet in the equipment display.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_ch: Displays your chestplate in the equipment display.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_le: Displays your leggings in the equipment display.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_fe: Displays your boots in the equipment display.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_ma: Displays your main-hand item in the equipment display.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_of: Displays your off-hand item in the equipment display.
Places your off-hand item to the left of your main-hand row instead of on its own row.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.hide_un: Hides durability numbers on items that cannot break.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_to: Shows how many of a held item you have across your entire inventory, not just the current stack.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_it: Shows the byte size of the held item's NBT data on the HUD.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.color_a: Colors armor durability values based on how much is remaining.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.color_m: Colors held item durability based on how much is remaining.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.color_o: Colors off-hand item durability based on how much is remaining.
fascinatedutils.module.clock.clock_forma: The date and time format shown by the clock widget.
fascinatedutils.module.ping.use_ping_col: Colors your ping based on connection quality.
fascinatedutils.module.system_cpu.use_cp: Colors the CPU display based on current usage.
fascinatedutils.module.fps.show_one_perc: Shows your 1%% low FPS alongside your current framerate.
fascinatedutils.module.fps.show_point_on: Shows your 0.1%% low FPS alongside your current framerate.
fascinatedutils.module.debug.turbo_stats: Shows skipped entity and particle counts as a ratio or a percentage.
fascinatedutils.setting.reduce_mac_os_re: Lowers the rendering resolution on macOS to improve performance.
Hides the boss health bar, showing only the name.
fascinatedutils.module.hypixel.auto_gg.d: Automatically sends "gg" in chat when a game ends.
fascinatedutils.module.hurtcam.cancel_hu: Stops the camera from shaking when you take damage.
fascinatedutils.module.blockoutline.show: Draws an outline around the block you're looking at.
fascinatedutils.module.blockoutline.outl: The color of the block outline.
fascinatedutils.module.blockoutline.show: Fills the targeted block with a color overlay.
fascinatedutils.module.blockoutline.bloc: The color used to fill the targeted block.
fascinatedutils.module.timechanger.world: Sets the time of day shown client-side.
fascinatedutils.module.inventorytweaks.q: Hold Shift and drag across slots to quickly move multiple items without clicking each one.
fascinatedutils.module.inventorytweaks.s: Scroll over a slot to instantly move that item to the other inventory.
fascinatedutils.module.inventorytweaks.a: Automatically switches to the next matching tool in your hotbar when your current one breaks.
fascinatedutils.module.fogcustomizer.wat: Controls how thick the fog appears underwater. Set to 0 to disable.
fascinatedutils.module.fogcustomizer.net: Controls how thick the fog appears in the Nether. Set to 0 to disable.
fascinatedutils.module.fogcustomizer.end: Controls how thick the fog appears in the End. Set to 0 to disable.
fascinatedutils.module.speed.include_ver: Counts vertical movement when calculating your speed.
fascinatedutils.module.speed.show_peak.d: Shows the highest speed reached in the last second.
fascinatedutils.module.speed.show_averag: Shows your average speed over the last second.
fascinatedutils.module.itemtooltip.gap_a: Adds a blank line between the item name and extra info lines in tooltips.
fascinatedutils.module.itemtooltip.show_: Shows the byte size of an item's data in its tooltip.
fascinatedutils.module.process_memory.me: The format used to display memory usage.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.create_: Creates a waypoint at your current position.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.show_be: Renders a colored beam at each waypoint location.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.label_o: Only shows the waypoint label when you're looking near it.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.show_bo: Draws a colored border around the waypoint label.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.label_p: Controls the padding around waypoint name labels.
fascinatedutils.module.waypoints.death_p: Automatically creates a waypoint at your death location.
fascinatedutils.waypoints.title: Waypoints
fascinatedutils.waypoints.create.title: Create Waypoint
fascinatedutils.waypoints.create.name: Name
fascinatedutils.waypoints.delete_popup.m: Are you sure you want to delete "%s"? This cannot be undone.
fascinatedutils.waypoints.edit.title: Edit Waypoint
fascinatedutils.module.blur.blur_strengt: How strong the background blur appears when a screen is open.
fascinatedutils.module.blur.animation_en: Smoothly fades the blur in and out when opening or closing a screen.
fascinatedutils.module.blur.animation_sp: How long the blur fade takes when opening or closing a screen, in milliseconds.
